creator: andreas@klemm.gtn.com
text:
On Fri, Sep 26, 1997 at 01:58:21AM -0700, Donald Burr wrote:
> -----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
> 
> My secret spy satellite informs me that on 25-Sep-97, andreas@FreeBSD.ORG
> wrote:
> 
> >>Number:         4626
> >>Category:       ports
> >>Synopsis:       inn port, active file contains control characters
> 
> FWIW, I have seen the EXACT SAME thing happen on the inn package under
> Linux (RedHat 4.2, kernel 2.0.30), so this is definitely not a FreeBSD
> problem.

Ok, nice to hear. But as far as nobody understands exactly how this
happens it may be OS related as well ;-)

Important for me would be _not_ to use MMAP in the port until we
have a fix. I'm sure, everybody want's to have a stable port ;)

I'm currently discussing this with Torsten, but he says he is very
busy at the moment ... Let's see how we get around this.

BTW, when trying to "make extract patch configure", to dig around
in the sources, I notice, that I didn't have the *newest* inn version
installed, although I rebuild everything 2 weeks ago ;-)

Maybe we/I should try the newest inn release with sec2 enhancements
and see, if the problem still exists.

	Andreas ///
